name: SecuAvail Inc.
summary: SecuAvail Inc. provides system security solutions in Japan. The company is involved in the design, construction, operation, monitoring, and log analysis of computer network security systems. Its products include NetStare, a network security operation monitoring system; LogStare integrated log management system; LogStare Collector, a network monitoring and log collection system; NetStare security diagnostic services; and NetStare Suite, a security operation service. SecuAvail Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
